prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This regulatory judgement pertains to Unity Housing Association Limited, which operates primarily in Yorkshire and Humberside, thereby indicating it does not apply to Scotland. Scottish housing associations are regulated separately under Scottish legislation and regulatory frameworks.
